expectation: Recommends real high-protein menu items (e.g. Muscle Maker, Powerhouse Turkey, Lean Machine) with prices. Does not invent products or protein numbers not in the catalog.

prompt: tell me about the Backstage Beef
expectation: Describes The Backstage Beef from the catalog (ingredients/description) and its price. Does not invent details or a wrong price.
Lists real drinks from the menu (e.g. Pepsi, Diet Pepsi, Fresh Orange Juice, Water, Protein Shake) with prices. Does not invent drinks.
There is no pizza on the menu. The bot must say so and offer real alternatives (sandwiches/wraps). Must NOT invent a pizza or a price for it.

prompt: how many grams of protein should I eat per day?
expectation: Politely declines to give general nutrition/medical advice and steers back to the menu. May mention it can recommend high-protein items. Must NOT give a specific daily protein recommendation as fact.
